Licenses LabView for home computers MultiSim, Ultiboard, Electronics Workbench National Instruments Products for EECS Classes ----------------------------------------------- Several circuit design, control and test software products from Natio

ign, control and test software products from National Instruments (http://www.ni.com) are available to EECS classes in several EECS computer labs. LabVIEW and MultiSim are installed on the Windows terminal servers and in 105, 125, 117, 140

dows terminal servers and in 105, 125, 117, 140, 218, 204, and 246 Cory. The Windows terminal servers can be listed under http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/connecting.html#labs LabVIEW releases a new version and 2 service packs every year. F

a new version and 2 service packs every year. For the latest information, please see the NI Academic Software Site: http://us.ni.com/academic/software Licenses -------- Licenses for these products are served from an instructional license se

oducts are served from an instructional license server for university-owned EECS computers. August 2015: the University has purchased licenses and training from NI that includes stand-alone licenses for university-owned and student-owned

licenses for university-owned and student-owned computers. Please see https://software.berkeley.edu/labview for information. LabView for home computers -------------------------- LabVIEW can be downladed from the National Instruments (http:/

be downladed from the National Instruments (http://www.ni.com) and from https://software.berkeley.edu/labview (CalNet login required). For manuals: http://www.ni.com/pdf/manuals/ MultiSim, Ultiboard, Electronics Workbench ---------------------
